site.description: Lucio Monsalbo's portfolio: software projects, cybersecurity writeups and 3D printed pieces. Security-by-design.

printing.title: 3D Printing
about.title: About me
about.description: Profile focused on cybersecurity, multi-platform development and 3D printing.
about.p1: I'm Lucio Monsalbo, focused on offensive and defensive cybersecurity in lab environments, alongside software development in C, mobile and web.
about.p2: This portfolio follows security-by-design: build-time validation, strict HTTP headers and zero PII exposed in HTML.
about.p3: I also document a 3D printing venture with functional PETG/PLA parts and custom prototypes.
